{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231630433DB4FE40EE73D5A9EAFE"}"},"total":696},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7502791526361826073","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的好看，让我看见了不一样的西游，你就果真不一样，就像1万个人眼中有1万种无利波特一样。           😍😍 还有作者真是太给力了，应该给作者一个大！！！写的让我10分的入迷，不愧是写出大作的作者，前一本书和这本书都10分好看，而且剧情上也进行了创新，添加了一些优秀元素，成就了这本书的10分好看的人，大家来欣赏一下。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746883184,"group_id":"7458556127609883710","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"想自由的乐子人，风！风！大风！壮哉兮！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5BTcALRUlhQrGcD291pPxxW+owhAd5AbBYMslxgvCYi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/94cca54366724ab9952b9bbf8ec714fc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788545&x-signature=sECy%2BP1eEE3rPJeNdPmaG7%2BYRks%3D","user_id":"1225275641181293","user_name":"星坠红瑚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1225275641181293","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7458556127609883710","book_info":{"abstract":"西游世界（主）+黑神话（辅）+洪荒西游（辅）+四游记（辅）+龙珠等其他“西游”要素二创作品......
李海益魂穿西游世界，靠着金手指拜入方寸山。学天罡三十六变和北冥游云，本以为就是个普通变化之术，没想到，这方寸山的天罡地煞变化，居然能通神得法，于是，李海益走上了一条别样的修行之路......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ofd43628b14bacb3fba4b4470bce00ffc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"江河海洋浩浩汤汤","author_id":"","book_id":"7458556127609883710","book_name":"西游之万界归源证大觉","book_short_name":"方寸山星神","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#808090","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9002人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7458556483202990654","read_count":"9002","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1345889"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"601","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,西游衍生,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/e185a2e5287abbf140a083d59df889e1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438643&x-signature=JzMtwbfyVygx%2FQcibCLFXQHflyg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1865243358668551","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"176"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231630433DB4FE40EE73D5A9EAFE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":
